title: sorghastrum nutans
intro: Sorghastrum nutans, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sorghastrum nutans include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Sorghastrum nutans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune system function.
